content: Implement TASK-072 archmap-impact-audit: a safe_read verifier that fails when an implementation-grade work item lacks a resolvable archmap impact record with a non-pending council status. Verification gate: negative fixture (missing disposition) must fail plus unit tests and release-state-audit integration follow-up. Stop condition: audit-only scope; no renderer work, no retroactive migration; tasks before TASK-071 are exempt via an explicit cutoff. QIF boundary: audit pass is structural/runtime evidence, not semantic architecture correctness.
